shareholderAddrs: JULE Investment Management AG, Stans, CH

triggerComment: Der Vollzug des Aktienverkaufs erfolgt innerhalb von 5 Bankwerktagen nach Eintritt sämtlicher Vollzugsbedingungen, jedoch frühestens am 30. April 2026 und spätestens am 30. Juni 2026.

The obligation to notify was triggered by a disposal of collateral (Acquisition and Share Position Obligation). With Recommendations of the Disclosure Office dated 15 July 2016, 17 June 2019, 8 July 2022 and 11 July 2025, BlackRock, Inc. was granted easing provisions from the obligation to disclose the direct shareholders according to Article 120 para. 1 FinMIA in conjunction with Article 11 let. b and Article 22 para. 1 let. e and para. 3 FinMIO-FINMA when disclosing holdings according to Article 18 para. 1 and 4 FinMIO-FINMA. However, collective investment schemes within the meaning of Article 18 para. 2 let. a FinMIO-FINMA that hold individually 3% or more of the voting rights of the relevant issuer will be mentioned in the relevant disclosure notification. Any person shall, at his/her request and without prove of interest, receive information about the direct shareholders within the meaning of Article 11 let. b an Article 22 para. 1 let. e and para. 3 FinMIO-FINMA.  Such request has to be addressed via email to the Disclosure Office: disclosure-office@six-group.com. The information will be provided in electronic format with a reference date not older than one month.  The easing provisions are granted until 15 July 2028.

triggerComment: With recommendation of the Disclosure Office of SIX Exchange Regulation AG dated 17 March 2022 and 7 March 2025, Janus Henderson Group plc was granted easing provisions from the obligation to disclose the direct shareholders according to Art. 120 para. 1 FinMIA in conjunction with Art. 11 let. b and Art. 22 para. 1 let. e and para. 3 FinMIO-FINMA when disclosing holdings according to Art. 18 para. 1 and 4 FinMIO-FINMA.

However, regarding collective investment schemes authorized for offering in Switzerland, Art. 18 para. 2 let. a FinMIO-FINMA is applicable, meaning that the reporting requirements for each collective investment scheme that individually holds 3% or more of the voting rights have to be fulfilled.

Any person shall, at her/his request and without proof of interest, receive information about the direct shareholders within the meaning of Art. 11 let. b and Art. 22 para. 1 let. e and para. 3 FinMIO-FINMA. Such requests have to be addressed via e-mail to the Disclosure Office: disclosure-office@six-group.com. The information will be provided within five trading days from receipt of the relevant request by Janus Henderson Group plc. The information will be provided in electronic format with a reference date not older than one month.
The easing provisions are granted until 7 March 2028.
